Pho Spot

← Back to all restaurants
★★★★★ 4.4
📍 San Jose, California📅 2026
Vietnamese Pho Rice Noodle Banh Mi
Tucked away in a corner plaza on Blossom Hill Rd in San Jose, right near Westfield Oakridge Mall, Pho Spot is a local favorite known for its signature clear-broth Phở (traditional Vietnamese noodle soup). The space is bright and clean, featuring a sunset mural of a silhouetted farmer with a carrying pole that adds a nice Vietnamese touch. With the same menu served all day, it’s a reliable go-to for Bay Area locals looking to satisfy their noodle cravings. The broth here is light yet delicate and full of flavor. The Rare Steak Phở features thinly sliced beef scalded to a perfect pink in the steaming soup, while the Meatball Phở comes loaded with bouncy, hearty meatballs. Every order is served with the classic side plate of bean sprouts, Thai basil, lime, and jalapeños so you can customize the heat and crunch to your liking. If you’re in the mood for something dry, try the Bún (rice vermicelli) topped with charcoal-grilled chicken and shrimp, served with pickled radish and carrots, crushed peanuts, and fish sauce. Their Bánh Mì (Vietnamese sandwich) is another winner—super crispy on the outside, stuffed with pâté, ham, and pickles, and served with a side of chips. For a refreshing start, the shrimp and pork spring rolls with peanut dipping sauce are a must. Perfect for family meals and anyone craving a clean, comforting bowl of noodles for lunch or dinner.
Good for Family meals Anyone craving a clean

What I ordered

Shrimp and Pork Fresh Spring Rolls (with Peanut Sauce) (Gỏi Cuốn) Rare Beef Rice Noodle Soup (Rare Steak Phở) Beef Ball Rice Noodle Soup (Meatball Phở) Grilled Chicken and Shrimp Rice Vermicelli (Bún) Vietnamese Baguette Special Combo (Bánh Mì Special Combo)
